feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,966Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 67

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,949Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,345Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 36

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Action without Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,797Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 30

Summary: Aroace Merlin and aromantic Gwaine are friends with benefits, using sex for stress relief, physical pleasure and emotional comfort.Arthur is asexual and very in love with Merlin.This seems like a recipe for disaster, but can they make it work?

entry.title: camellia sinensis
entry.summary:
Author: lemoncellbros

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,217Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: To that woman at the shop, Merlin is going home to someone who loves him. The Merlin in her mind might spend the night eating cheap Chinese takeaway with Arthur, arms curled around each others’ shoulders while they watch a film. Merlin surprises him with a special Assam blend. Arthur hops in the shower with him and runs his fingers through his hair. They fall asleep together, and Arthur makes him truly atrocious eggs on toast in the morning, and Merlin gets to be loved back.Suddenly, Merlin wants to live in that world. He wants it so badly he feels sick. (Or: Merlin tells his coworkers that Arthur is his boyfriend. Predictably, it backfires).

entry.title: Would You Tell Me Why
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,386Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 101

Summary: Merlin and Arthur have been together for two years. So, when Arthur finally got up the courage to propose, the last thing he expected was to hear the word no. What he really didn’t expect was that Merlin wouldn’t even explain why he won’t marry him. Obviously, Merlin’s magic wasn’t the only secret he had been keeping from Arthur all these years. But there is little time to solve his relationship woes as a new king who has just ascended to the throne in a neighboring country has demanded immediate audience in Camelot.

entry.title: An Exploration of Grief
entry.summary:
Author: inthemiddleofwishing

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,731Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Merlin gave up his life in the future to come back in time to Arthur. He doesn't regret it one bit, but the grief of leaving everything behind stubbornly exists despite that. Aka Arthur finds Merlin crying over a teapot.

entry.title: The Confession of a Future King
entry.summary:
Author: andromaex

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,125Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Arthur has always known who he is. He is the crown prince of Camelot. He will one day be king. He likes women. These are facts as certain and unquestioned as the rising of the sun. Then one afternoon, Arthur looks at Merlin and thinks he's beautiful. Terrified of what it means and convinced he will destroy the most important relationship in his life, Arthur struggles to bury feelings that only grow stronger with time. But Merlin has always known Arthur better than anyone—and when the truth finally comes out, Arthur discovers he may not be the only one who has been keeping secrets. Prompt: Man

entry.title: In lumine tuo videbimus lumen
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,517Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 44

Summary: Merlin reaches Avalon too late. Arthur dies with love on his tongue, and Merlin’s answer follows him across the water. In the light of Alban Hefin, death opens one last road - but neither destiny nor love will let them walk it unchanged.

entry.title: The dying need but little dear
entry.summary:
Author: Memoryloss_yes_again

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,485Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 8

Summary: After a hunt goes sideways, in a true Camelot fashion, Merlin gets stuck in a bedroll. Arthur is drowning in feelings he doesn't dare to say out loud. The knights won’t stop asking questions. And somewhere in the middle of all that, Merlin might be immortal. Overall a pretty normal day in Camelot.

entry.title: The Scar Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: DILLIGAF_iykyk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,217Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 48

Summary: The bandits came from the tree line like shadows given teeth. Arthur had his sword drawn before the first cry rang out, steel singing free of the scabbard as he pivoted toward the rush of bodies.They were outnumbered—six knights against what looked like twenty men, ragged and desperate, pouring from the dark wood on either side of the forest road.

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,035Chapters: 9/16Kudos: 25

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: Significant purchase
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,130Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: “Damn it, Merlin,” Arthur hissed as the mouth returned, hotter, wetter, more insistent. “Stop. I’m working.” “I know, I know,” Merlin answered cheerfully, not stopping at all. If anything, he redoubled his efforts, one hand gently rolling Arthur’s balls while his mouth worked the length with single-minded devotion. “Taxes to collect. Lands to grant. Titles to bestow. Trade rules to argue over… blah blah blah. The noble duties of a king.”

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,900Chapters: 9/11Kudos: 14

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

entry.title: when I'm all over your mouth (just tell me I'm yours)
entry.summary:
Author: philsslit

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,533Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: "Didn't you say you were going to- uh- what'd you say? Show me how to use a sword?""Jesus, would you rather fuck me or the sword?" Merlin acts exacerbated, as if this isn't part of the plan, as if she doesn't know exactly what Arthur is going to say next."Hm. I vote both."“You are completely ridiculous.”“So are you. We’re even. Now can we please get to it?” Arthur pleads, looking at her like some lovestruck puppy.“Get to what? The sword threesome?”orMerlin fucks Arthur with a sword. Also they're lesbians. Happy pride!

entry.title: Lukewarm Annoyance's
entry.summary:
Author: wspkanlily_org

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,216Chapters: 1/12Kudos: 12

Summary: “What did you call me?” “A prat, now if you’ll please get out of my way.” He really did think he was gonna get beat up or pushed against a wall or spit at but instead Pendragon's lips moved to what looked like a small smile. What about this interaction made him so giddy? “You really can’t address me like that.” “Oh okay, do you prefer ass or?”   Or   Arthur is the captain of the rugby team in Camelot University and Merlin is a wallflower who keeps to himself, or at least tries to. After one interaction they both decide they hate one another. Both are perfectly content to keep to their separate ways of life but unfortunately for them, Arthur can't keep his grades high enough to continue playing. He needs a solution quick and the only tutor available is Merlin. Just his luck. Merlin agrees and they both vow to never speak to each other again once the semester ends, but fate or... destiny... might have other plans.

entry.title: Two Sides Of The Same Coin: The Tale Of The Once And Future King
entry.summary:
Author: L4dyH4rm0n14

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,297Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Everybody inside the walls of Camelot knew of The Great Purge that had happened twenty-two summers hence. 'Tis was the day the Pendragon Reign had fallen to meet its end.Ygraine Pendragon had died giving birth to a child, and Uther Pendragon had been exiled from his very kingdom after admitting defeat against the Dragonlord, Balinor.The very name, Pendragon, had been erased from the records. Never to be remembered, nor spoken of again.*~~*Having grown up in the confines of his small village, Arthur Pendragon has always sought out a better life for him and his father.When Arthur ventures to Camelot in search for honest work, he did not expect to become a knight guarding the prince.*~~*Prophecy has been told by Kilgharrah that Merlin's destiny, the Once and Future King of Albion will rightfully claim the throne as his birthright.
